title: Mouthwatering Roasted Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A classic Malaysian dish featuring marinated chicken roasted to perfection on a hot stone plate, served with capers and a side of fluffy rice.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, if desired.
Place the chicken on a hot stone plate and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the capers by rinsing them with water and chopping them finely.
Serve the roasted chicken on a bed of fluffy rice, garnished with chopped capers.
Garnish with additional lime wedges, if desired.
